ab: pakusa su nanu musa i takak?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: papiray kung turaku musa takak.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: pananu musa kuysang hiya?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: pahakay musa kuysang hiya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: pananu su musa i Pongxu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: pagaluw kung kulu palaka musa Pongxu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: pananu su musa i Pongxu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: pagaluw kung asu musa Pongxu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: nanu galagan su muwah sali la?
en: How do you go home?

ab: pgaluw kung kisya zik musa sali.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Kagaw pagaluw su nanu musa i pakaba’an biru?
en: How does Kagaw  go to school?

ab: pagaluw kisya Kagaw musa pakaba’an biru.
en: Kagaw goes to school by train.

ab: Suyan pagaluw su nanu musa i kyukay?
en: How does Suyan go to church?

ab: pagaluw na lilinsya Suyan musa kyukay.
en: Suyan goes to church by bicycle.

ab: pagaluw su kisya zik musa miru aw?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ayat, pagaluw kung bas musa miru.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: pagaluw su lilinsya musa miru aw?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: hu, pagaluw kung lilinsya musa miru.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: pagaluw su kisya haylaw musa Takaw aw?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: hu, pagaluw kung kisya haylaw musa Takaw.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: musa su i Taytung ga pagaluw su kisya ini ga pagaluw su kulu palaka?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: maluw kung kulu palaka hiya ga, yanga su maluw na kisya hiya.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: musa su Kyukay ga pagaluw su bas ka papiray su turaku?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: miray kung turaku musa Kyukay hiya ga, yanga su sagaluw bas hiya.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: katuwa sawbih ki rahu banasan ku sali su?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: ini kasawbih, mutu kung gamaluw su utubay musa rahu banasan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: kasawbih kaba’an biru ku sasatuwan su biru aw?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: sawbih ay, hamakay la ga tayhuk la.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: sawbih ki nani’an ku nanan bas aw?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: mahatu su nanan ru hamakay tikay la ga tayhuk la.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
